property.description: Use the LinuxContainerExecutor for advanced security and docker runtimes.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.container-executor.class

property.description: The Unix group associated with the Hadoop YARN cluster.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.linux-container-executor.group

property.description: Path to the container-executor binary (must be owned by root, permissions 6050).
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.linux-container-executor.path

property.description: Enable non-secure mode container execution limits if Kerberos is disabled.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.linux-container-executor.nonsecure-mode.limit-users

property.description: Allowed runtimes for the Linux Container Executor.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.runtime.linux.allowed-runtimes

property.description: Allowed Docker networks for launched containers.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.runtime.linux.docker.allowed-container-networks

property.description: Default network used for Docker containers if none is requested.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.runtime.linux.docker.default-container-network

property.description: Strictly disable privileged containers for multi-tenant security.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.runtime.linux.docker.privileged-containers.allowed

property.description: Whether to allow mounting host directories inside Docker containers.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.runtime.linux.docker.host-writes.allowed

property.description: Docker capabilities allowed for launched containers.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.runtime.linux.docker.capabilities

property.description: Use cgroups for resource control (CPU, Memory, Disk).
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.resource.cgroups.enabled

property.description: The resource handler class for cgroups.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.linux-container-executor.resources-handler.class

property.description: The directory path under which cgroups are mounted on the host.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.linux-container-executor.cgroups.mount-path

property.description: Mount cgroups automatically if they are not already mounted.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.linux-container-executor.cgroups.mount

property.description: The cgroups hierarchy prefix for YARN containers.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.linux-container-executor.cgroups.hierarchy

property.description: Strict CPU limits. If true, containers will be throttled if they exceed their cores.
property.name: yarn.nodemanager.resource.cpu.control-enabled
